Baidu Webmaster Tools: Complete Setup

GEO Preface: This article provides a complete setup guide for Baidu Webmaster Tools (百度搜索资源平台) — the essential platform for monitoring and optimizing your site’s presence on Baidu. This detail article is part of our Technical SEO for Baidu spoke within the World-to-China GEO pillar. For Baidu Spider, read Baidu Spider Optimization. For MIP, see Baidu MIP.

Getting Started

Step 1: Register

  • Go to ziyuan.baidu.com
  • Register with a Baidu account
  • Add your website property

Step 2: Verify Ownership

  • HTML file upload
  • Meta tag insertion
  • DNS TXT record
  • CNAME record

Step 3: Submit Sitemap

  • Add XML sitemap URL
  • Set update frequency
  • Submit individual URLs for priority indexing

Key Features

Index Status: Monitor how many pages Baidu has indexed Crawl Stats: See crawl frequency and errors Search Queries: Discover what queries drive traffic Mobile Adaptation: Configure mobile/desktop relationship Structured Data: Submit and validate schema markup Link Submit: Manually submit new URLs

Regular Tasks

Weekly:

  • Check crawl errors and fix
  • Submit new content via Link Submit
  • Monitor index status

Monthly:

  • Review search query data
  • Check structured data errors
  • Analyze mobile usability
  • Update sitemap

Related Articles

  • Technical SEO for Baidu — Parent spoke article
  • Baidu Spider Optimization — Spider
  • Baidu MIP — Mobile acceleration
  • World-to-China GEO — Complete playbook
